attribution: Medication identities are factual. Original brief notes by the project author. ISMP maintains the authoritative list and formatting: https://www.ismp.org/

meds.name: Insulin (all formulations)
meds.note: Narrow therapeutic window. Errors in dose, formulation, or timing cause hypoglycemia or hyperglycemia.

meds.name: Heparin (all formulations)
meds.note: Anticoagulation errors cause severe bleeding or clotting. Use standard concentrations and double-check.

meds.name: Opioids
meds.note: Respiratory depression risk. PCA programming errors and look-alike concentrations are common error sources.

meds.name: Concentrated electrolytes (KCl, hypertonic saline)
meds.note: Bolus or rapid infusion can be fatal. Restrict access and require dilution.

meds.name: Chemotherapy
meds.note: Narrow margin between therapeutic and toxic doses. Standardized order sets and double-check protocols required.
